[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110110 4
1 0000000110 2
2 1011110000 5
3 0000001000 1
4 0011110001 5
5 0000000000 a
6 0000010001 2
7 0010000000 1

01 10 0000011001 3
12 21 0001010000 2
23 32 0000010010 2
34 43 0000000110 2 match 1

56 65 1000100110 4
67 76 1000100000 2
70 07 0000010001 2 match 6

02 20 0000010000 1
13 31 0100110001 4
24 42 0000000010 1
35 53 0000110110 4 match 0
46 64 0000000110 2 match 1
57 75 1011110000 5 match 2
60 06 0000001000 1 match 3
71 17 0011110001 5 match 4

14 41 0010000000 1 match 7
25 52 0001010010 3
36 63 0000100110 3
47 74 0010000000 1 match 7
50 05 0000010000 1
61 16 0000101000 2
72 27 0001010000 2

26 62 0000000010 1
37 73 0000110001 3
